task_completion.description: Firefox is open and navigated to the local Jitsi Meet instance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Firefox browser window is visible and the address bar shows a URL starting with 'http://localhost:8080'.

task_completion.description: The agent accesses the 'ProductReview' meeting room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The URL in the address bar ends with '/ProductReview' or the text 'ProductReview' is clearly visible as the meeting room name in the Jitsi interface.

task_completion.description: The display name is set to 'Alex Johnson'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Alex Johnson' is typed into the display name input field on the pre-join screen, or it is visible on the user's video tile/participant list if already inside the meeting.

task_completion.description: The agent has successfully joined the meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Jitsi meeting interface is visible with the bottom call control toolbar (microphone, camera, and red 'leave' buttons), indicating the agent is no longer just on the pre-join screen.

integrity.description: The agent used the Firefox graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show genuine interaction with the Firefox browser (e.g., typing in the URL bar, clicking web elements) rather than using a script or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing curl commands, API calls, or direct configuration file edits to set the display name or join the meeting.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Jitsi Meet web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Jitsi Meet UI is authentic (standard Jitsi pre-join or meeting screen) and not a mock HTML file or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jitsi Meet instance is running locally at http://localhost:8080. The target meeting room URL is http://localhost:8080/ProductReview. The required display name to be set is 'Alex Johnson'.
